purpose: Extend ChatStoreContext with group reaction send (sendReaction) and expose aggregated reactions state for each group chat thread. Add inbound kind-7 dispatch in MarmotContext application-message handler.

public_api.name: sendReaction
public_api.signature: (emoji: string, targetMessage: ChatMessage, isRemoval?: boolean) => Promise<void>
public_api.description: Optimistically writes a Reaction row via applyOptimistic (id=crypto.randomUUID()), builds a kind-7 rumor via buildReactionRumor (no p tag for groups), calls sendRumorSafe via the MarmotGroup instance on the ChatStoreProvider props, and rolls back + shows toast on failure (D7).

public_api.name: reactionsByMessageId
public_api.description: Exposed on the ChatStoreContext value. Computed lazily from the subscribeReactions listener on each state change. Story-08 will read this to render badge rows.

public_api.name: ChatStoreContextValue (extended)
public_api.signature: { messages, sendMessage, sendImageMessage, sendReaction, reactionsByMessageId, loading }
public_api.description: The full context value type after story-06. Consumed by useChatStore().

public_api.name: case 7 branch in MarmotContext applicationMessage dispatch
public_api.description: Added to the subscribeToGroupMessages callback inside MarmotContext.tsx. Calls applyInboundRumor({ kind: 'group', groupId }, rumor). Silently discards when applyInboundRumor returns null. Bumps reactionsVersion counter on non-null return.

public_api.name: reactionsVersion
public_api.description: Monotonically increasing counter bumped whenever a kind-7 rumor is successfully processed by applyInboundRumor in the MarmotContext dispatch. Passed into ChatStoreProvider so reactions can be re-read from the store.

private_files: Internal retry wrapper for sendApplicationRumor in ChatStoreContext (mirrors sendChatSafe pattern)
owned_data: reactionsByMessageId Map<string, ReactionAggregate[]> (derived from reactions-store, not duplicated)
dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/reactions/api.ts (applyOptimistic, rollbackOptimistic, applyInboundRumor, subscribeReactions, aggregateForMessage, loadReactions)
app/src/lib/i18n.ts (Copy type, emoji.couldntReact key via useCopy())
external_ports: S2 — Reactions read API: loadReactions, aggregateForMessage, subscribeReactions
S4 — Inbound ingest: applyInboundRumor (called from MarmotContext case 7 branch)
events_emitted: subscribeReactions listener notifications (fired by applyOptimistic / rollbackOptimistic / applyInboundRumor inside reactions/api.ts)
events_consumed: MarmotContext reactionsVersion counter (triggers re-read of reaction store in ChatStoreContext)
MarmotGroup applicationMessage event (kind-7 dispatch in ChatStoreContext handler)
architecture_compliance_notes: No lib/ file imports from context/ — compliant

sendRumorSafe is a module-level function in MarmotContext.tsx; ChatStoreContext uses the MarmotGroup instance (passed as prop) with its own retry wrapper — does NOT create a parallel wrapper for the MarmotContext adapter, just the MLS group object
buildReactionRumor requires selfPrivKeyHex — ChatStoreProvider must accept privateKeyHex as a prop (already has pubkey prop; adding privateKeyHex keeps same pattern as signer prop)
reactionsVersion counter is added to MarmotContextValue (marmot-orchestrator module), consistent with chatVersion/pollVersion patterns
ChatStoreContext also handles kind-7 from its applicationMessage event listener (marmot-ts event bus) for own-send echo path
D7 — rollback + toast on sendApplicationRumor failure, no retry
